name: Burhanudin Nuban
title: Full Stack Developer & DevSecOps Engineer
description: Hi, my name is Burhanudin Nuban, a 27-year-old Fullstack Developer & DevSecOps Engineer with more than 6 years of hands-on experience in software engineering. I am deeply passionate about designing and implementing secure, scalable, and high-performing systems that seamlessly integrate development, security, and operations.
